checkpoint_summary: This normal full Atlas Sunset closes the chat while preserving the exact durable results and restart context. protected_data.clean_summary: Only sanitized doctrine, public repository identities, merged-PR evidence references, lifecycle state, unresolved work, and restart guidance are included. No credentials, tokens, keys, MFA or recovery codes, private network values, PHI, raw finance or account evidence, private exports, or unredacted logs are stored.
